Junior Web Developer

BrightPath Studio is hiring a junior Web Developer to build and maintain small
business websites, landing pages, and internal web tools. This hands-on role is
for someone who can turn straightforward designs and written requirements into
clean, responsive pages while collaborating with designers, project managers,
developers, and clients.

Requirements:
- Build responsive web pages with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
- Update existing website content, layouts, forms, and navigation
- Work from design mockups and written feature requests
- Test pages in Chrome, Safari, Firefox, and common mobile screen sizes
- Diagnose and fix front-end problems involving layout, forms, and browser behavior
- Use Git for version control and collaboration with other developers
- Explain progress, tradeoffs, and blockers clearly to technical and
  non-technical teammates

Nice to have:
- Experience with React or another component-based front-end framework
- Familiarity with semantic HTML and basic accessibility practices
- Basic understanding of website performance and SEO
- Experience working with client websites or in a small agency environment
